news.t: Global X ETFs Introduces the Global X Infrastructure Development Ex-U.S. ETF (IPAV)

holdings.infoBox: IPAV is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are ArcelorMittal stock at 3.25%, Canadian Pacific Kansas City at 3.19%, Canadian National Railway Company at 3.18%, Heidelberg Materials AG at 3.17%, and Larsen & Toubro at 3.16%.

overview.description: The Global X Infrastructure Development ex-U.S. ETF (IPAV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies outside the US that derive the majority of their revenue from infrastructure development. IPAV was launched on Aug 27, 2024 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Global X Infrastructure Development ex-U.S. Index

data.title: Global X ETFs Introduces the Global X Infrastructure Development Ex-U.S. ETF (IPAV)
data.text: NEW YORK, Aug. 28, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X ETFs, the New York-based provider of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch the Global X Infrastructure Development ex-U.S. ETF (IPAV...
